key.name: dock-position
key.description: Dock is shown on the Left, Right, Top or Bottom side of the screen.

key.name: animation-time
key.description: Sets the time duration of the autohide effect.

key.name: show-delay
key.description: Sets the delay after the mouse reaches the screen border before showing the dock.

key.name: hide-delay
key.description: Sets the delay after the mouse left the dock before hiding it.

key.name: disable-overview-on-startup
key.summary: Do not show overview on startup
key.description: Whether to show or not the overview during startup animation.

key.name: custom-background-color
key.summary: Set a custom dash background background color
key.description: Sets the color for the dash background.

key.name: background-color
key.description: Customize the background color of the dash.

key.name: transparency-mode
key.description: FIXED: constant transparency. DYNAMIC: dock takes the opaque style only when windows are close to it.

key.name: running-indicator-style
key.description: DEFAULT: .... DOTS: ....

key.name: running-indicator-dominant-color
key.summary: Use application icon dominant color for the indicator color

key.name: customize-alphas
key.summary: Manually set the min and max opacity
key.description: For the dynamic mode, the min/max opacity values will be given by 'min-alpha' and 'max-alpha'.

key.name: min-alpha
key.summary: Opacity of the dash background when free-floating
key.description: Sets the opacity of the dash background when no windows are close.

key.name: max-alpha
key.summary: Opacity of the dash background when windows are close.
key.description: Sets the opacity of the dash background when windows are close.

key.name: background-opacity
key.description: Sets the opacity of the dash background when in autohide mode.

key.name: manualhide
key.description: Enable or disable manualhide mode

key.name: intellihide
key.description: Enable or disable intellihide mode

key.name: intellihide-mode
key.summary: Define which windows are considered for intellihide.

key.name: autohide
key.description: Enable or disable autohide mode

key.name: require-pressure-to-show
key.description: Enable or disable requiring pressure to show the dash

key.name: pressure-threshold
key.description: Sets how much pressure is needed to show the dash.

key.name: autohide-in-fullscreen
key.description: Enable autohide in fullscreen mode.

key.name: show-dock-urgent-notify
key.description: Show dock when urgent notifications are received.

key.name: dock-fixed
key.description: Dock is always visible

key.name: scroll-switch-workspace
key.summary: Switch workspace by scrolling over the dock
key.description: Add the possibility to switch workspace by mouse scrolling over the dock.

key.name: dash-max-icon-size
key.description: Set the allowed maximum dash icon size. Allowed range: 16..64.

key.name: preview-size-scale
key.description: Set the allowed maximum dash preview size scale. Allowed range: 0,00..1,00.

key.name: icon-size-fixed
key.description: Keep the icon size fixed by scrolling the dock.

key.name: apply-custom-theme
key.description: Apply customization to the dash appearance

key.name: custom-theme-shrink
key.description: TODO

key.name: custom-theme-customize-running-dots
key.summary: Customize the style of the running application indicators.
key.description: Customize the style of the running application indicators.

key.name: custom-theme-running-dots-color
key.description: Customize the color of the running application indicators.

key.name: custom-theme-running-dots-border-color
key.description: Customize the border color of the running application indicators.

key.name: custom-theme-running-dots-border-width
key.description: Customize the border width of the running application indicators.

key.name: show-running
key.description: Show or hide running applications icons in the dash

key.name: group-apps
key.description: Group application windows under a single icon in the dash

key.name: isolate-workspaces
key.description: Dash shows only windows from the current workspace, this is applied only if gnome-shell 'current-workspace-only' app-switcher settings is disabled

key.name: workspace-agnostic-urgent-windows
key.summary: Show urgent windows on each workspace
key.description: Show or hide urgent windows on each workspace in the dash

key.name: isolate-monitors
key.description: Dash shows only windows from the monitor

key.name: scroll-to-focused-application
key.description: Ensure that the focused application icon is always visible in the dash

key.name: show-windows-preview
key.summary: Show preview of the open windows
key.description: Replace open windows list with windows previews

key.name: default-windows-preview-to-open
key.description: Window previews will show windows by default, rather than hide them behind a drop dowm menu.

key.name: show-favorites
key.description: Show or hide favorite applications icons in the dash

key.name: show-trash
key.description: Show or hide the trash can icon in the dash

key.name: show-mounts
key.description: Show or hide mounted volume and device icons in the dash

key.name: show-mounts-only-mounted
key.summary: Only show mounted volumes and devices
key.description: Show or hide unmounted volume and device icons in the dash

key.name: show-mounts-network
key.description: Show or hide network volumes in the dash

key.name: isolate-locations
key.summary: Isolate volumes, devices and trash windows
key.description: Consider volume, devices and trash as different application windows and not part of the file manager

key.name: dance-urgent-applications
key.description: Wiggle urgent application icons in the dash

key.name: bounce-icons
key.description: Bounce icons when launching applications

key.name: show-show-apps-button
key.description: Show applications button in the dash

key.name: show-apps-at-top
key.summary: Show application button on the left
key.description: Show application button on the left of the dash

key.name: show-apps-always-in-the-edge
key.summary: Show application button on the edge when using centered panel mode

key.name: bolt-support
key.description: Make the extension work properly when bolt extensions is enabled

key.name: height-fraction
key.summary: Dock max height/width (fraction of available space)

key.name: extend-height
key.summary: Extend the dock container to all the available height/width

key.name: always-center-icons
key.summary: Center icons when dock container is extended to all the available size

key.name: dock-margin-size
key.description: The margin size around the dock in pixels.

key.name: preferred-monitor-by-connector
key.summary: Monitor on which putting the dock (by connector)
key.description: Set on which monitor to put the dock, for example 'DisplayPort-0'. Use 'primary' for the primary monitor.

key.name: multi-monitor
key.description: Show a dock on every monitor

key.name: click-action
key.summary: Action when clicking on a running app
key.description: Set the action that is executed when clicking on the icon of a running application

key.name: scroll-action
key.description: Set the action that is executed when scrolling on the application icon

key.name: shift-click-action
key.summary: Action when shift+clicking on a running app
key.description: Set the action that is executed when shift+clicking on the icon of a running application

key.name: middle-click-action
key.summary: Action when clicking on a running app
key.description: Set the action that is executed when middle-clicking on the icon of a running application

key.name: shift-middle-click-action
key.summary: Action when clicking on a running app
key.description: Set the action that is executed when shift+middle-clicking on the icon of a running application

key.name: hot-keys
key.description: Launch and switch between dash items using Super+(0-9)

key.name: hotkeys-show-dock
key.summary: Show the dock when using the hotkeys
key.description: The dock will be quickly shown so that the number-overlay is visible and app activation is easier

key.name: shortcut-text
key.summary: Keybinding to show the dock and the number overlay.
key.description: Behavior depends on hotkeys-show-dock and hotkeys-overlay.

key.name: shortcut
key.summary: Keybinding to show the dock and the number overlay.
key.description: Behavior depends on hotkeys-show-dock and hotkeys-overlay.

key.name: shortcut-timeout
key.description: Sets the time duration before the dock is hidden again.

key.name: hotkeys-overlay
key.summary: Show the dock when using the hotkeys
key.description: The dock will be quickly shown so that the number-overlay is visible and app activation is easier

key.name: app-ctrl-hotkey-1
key.description: Keybinding to launch 1st app.

key.name: app-ctrl-hotkey-2
key.description: Keybinding to launch 2nd app.

key.name: app-ctrl-hotkey-3
key.description: Keybinding to launch 3rd app.

key.name: app-ctrl-hotkey-4
key.description: Keybinding to launch 4th app.

key.name: app-ctrl-hotkey-5
key.description: Keybinding to launch 5th app.

key.name: app-ctrl-hotkey-6
key.description: Keybinding to launch 6th app.

key.name: app-ctrl-hotkey-7
key.description: Keybinding to launch 7th app.

key.name: app-ctrl-hotkey-8
key.description: Keybinding to launch 8th app.

key.name: app-ctrl-hotkey-9
key.description: Keybinding to launch 9th app.

key.name: app-ctrl-hotkey-10
key.description: Keybinding to launch 10th app.

key.name: app-shift-hotkey-1
key.summary: Keybinding to trigger 1st dash app with shift behavior
key.description: Keybinding to trigger 1st app with shift behavior.

key.name: app-shift-hotkey-2
key.summary: Keybinding to trigger 2nd dash app with shift behavior
key.description: Keybinding to trigger 2nd app with shift behavior.

key.name: app-shift-hotkey-3
key.summary: Keybinding to trigger 3rd dash app with shift behavior
key.description: Keybinding to trigger 3rd app with shift behavior.

key.name: app-shift-hotkey-4
key.summary: Keybinding to trigger 4th dash app with shift behavior
key.description: Keybinding to trigger 4th app with shift behavior.

key.name: app-shift-hotkey-5
key.summary: Keybinding to trigger 5th dash app with shift behavior
key.description: Keybinding to trigger 5th app with shift behavior.

key.name: app-shift-hotkey-6
key.summary: Keybinding to trigger 6th dash app with shift behavior
key.description: Keybinding to trigger 6th app with shift behavior.

key.name: app-shift-hotkey-7
key.summary: Keybinding to trigger 7th dash app with shift behavior
key.description: Keybinding to trigger 7th app with shift behavior.

key.name: app-shift-hotkey-8
key.summary: Keybinding to trigger 8th dash app with shift behavior
key.description: Keybinding to trigger 8th app with shift behavior.

key.name: app-shift-hotkey-9
key.summary: Keybinding to trigger 9th dash app with shift behavior
key.description: Keybinding to trigger 9th app with shift behavior.

key.name: app-shift-hotkey-10
key.summary: Keybinding to trigger 10th dash app with shift behavior
key.description: Keybinding to trigger 10th app with shift behavior.

key.name: app-hotkey-1
key.description: Keybinding to either show or launch the 1st application in the dash.

key.name: app-hotkey-2
key.description: Keybinding to either show or launch the 2nd application in the dash.

key.name: app-hotkey-3
key.description: Keybinding to either show or launch the 3rd application in the dash.

key.name: app-hotkey-4
key.description: Keybinding to either show or launch the 4th application in the dash.

key.name: app-hotkey-5
key.description: Keybinding to either show or launch the 5th application in the dash.

key.name: app-hotkey-6
key.description: Keybinding to either show or launch the 6th application in the dash.

key.name: app-hotkey-7
key.description: Keybinding to either show or launch the 7th application in the dash.

key.name: app-hotkey-8
key.description: Keybinding to either show or launch the 8th application in the dash.

key.name: app-hotkey-9
key.description: Keybinding to either show or launch the 9th application in the dash.

key.name: app-hotkey-10
key.description: Keybinding to either show or launch the 10th application in the dash.

key.name: force-straight-corner
key.description: Make the borders in the dash non rounded

key.name: custom-border-radius
key.description: Set a custom border radius for the dock background in pixels. Set to -1 to use the theme default.

key.name: unity-backlit-items
key.summary: Enable unity7 like glossy backlit items
key.description: Emulate the unity7 backlit glossy items behaviour

key.name: apply-glossy-effect
key.description: Toggle the glossy effect of the unity7 backlit feature.

key.name: dock-style
key.description: Visual style for the dock background. FLAT is the default minimal style. SHELF adds a macOS-like 3D shelf with gradient, edge highlights, and depth.

key.name: shelf-gradient-top-opacity
key.description: Opacity of the top edge gradient in shelf style (0.0 to 1.0).

key.name: shelf-gradient-bottom-opacity
key.description: Opacity of the bottom edge gradient in shelf style (0.0 to 1.0).

key.name: shelf-highlight-opacity
key.description: Opacity of the top highlight line in shelf style (0.0 to 1.0).

key.name: shelf-border-opacity
key.description: Opacity of the border edges in shelf style (0.0 to 1.0).

key.name: shelf-angle
key.description: Controls the inward slope of the shelf sides (0.0 = rectangle, 1.0 = maximum angle).

key.name: shelf-height
key.description: How far down the dock the shelf starts (0.0 = full height, 1.0 = just a sliver at the bottom).

key.name: shelf-reflection
key.description: Show a subtle reflection gradient below the dock in shelf style.

key.name: shelf-reflection-opacity
key.description: Opacity of the reflection effect below the dock in shelf style (0.0 to 1.0).

key.name: hide-tooltip
key.description: Hide tooltip when hovering application in the dash.

key.name: tooltip-max-width-percent
key.description: Maximum tooltip label width as a percentage of the monitor width.

key.name: show-icons-emblems
key.description: Show application icons emblems such as notification counters an progress bars.

key.name: progress-indicator-style
key.description: Style for progress indicators: 'bar' (horizontal bar) or 'arc' (circular arc around the icon).

key.name: show-icons-notifications-counter
key.summary: Show the number of unread notifications in icons
key.description: Show application icons emblems such as notification

key.name: application-counter-overrides-notifications
key.summary: Wether the application-provioded counter via Unity API should override the notifications or be summed to it
key.description: If an application provides a counter through the Unity API, then such value will be used. Otherwise the counter will be summed with the unread notification numbers (if enabled)

key.name: clear-notifications-on-focus
key.summary: Clear notification counter when app gets focus
key.description: Automatically clear the notification counter badge on a dock icon when the application window receives focus. The notifications themselves remain in the GNOME Shell notification tray.

key.name: user-categories
key.description: JSON array of category configurations with id and apps list

key.name: dock-order
key.description: Ordered list of app IDs and category IDs defining the persistent dock sequence

key.name: spring-animations
key.description: Use spring-based physics for dock show/hide and icon transitions.

key.name: pinned-commands
key.description: JSON array of pinned command configurations with label, command, icon, and options.

key.name: show-pinned-commands
key.description: Show pinned terminal command icons in the dock.

key.name: dock-tiling-enabled
key.description: Drag dock icons to screen edges to tile application windows.

key.name: show-previews-hover
key.summary: Show window previews on mouse hover
key.description: Display window previews when hovering over application icons in the dock

key.name: show-workspace-minimap
key.description: Show a compact workspace indicator in the dock for quick workspace switching.

key.name: workspace-minimap-position
key.description: Where to place the workspace minimap: 'start' (before favorites) or 'end' (after running apps).

key.name: show-recent-files
key.summary: Show recent files flyout on dock icons
key.description: Show recently opened files when hovering over or middle-clicking app icons in the dock.

key.name: show-quick-settings
key.summary: Show quick settings button in dock
key.description: Show a quick settings panel accessible from the dock.

key.name: drag-to-focus
key.summary: Focus app window when dragging over dock icon
key.description: Raise and focus an application window when an external file is dragged over its dock icon.

key.name: preview-animation-style
key.description: Animation style for window previews: 0: Instant (no animation) 1: Fade 2: Slide 3: Scale (zoom) 4: Expand (default) 5: Dissolve 6: Cascade (staggered)

key.name: show-screencast-indicator
key.description: Show a visual indicator on the dock when screen recording or screen sharing is active.

key.name: show-media-controls
key.summary: Show media transport controls on dock icons
key.description: Show play/pause/skip controls when hovering over dock icons of apps currently playing audio.

key.name: wiggle-mode-enabled
key.summary: Enable wiggle mode for icon rearranging
key.description: Long-press dock icons to enter wiggle mode for easier rearranging and unpinning.

key.name: wallpaper-adaptive-color
key.summary: Automatically tint dock color from wallpaper
key.description: Extract the dominant color from the desktop wallpaper and use it as the dock background color.

key.name: wallpaper-adaptive-intensity
key.description: How strongly the wallpaper color influences the dock background (0.0 to 1.0).

key.name: icon-magnification
key.description: Scale up dock icons as the cursor passes over them with a parabolic falloff effect.

key.name: icon-magnification-factor
key.description: Maximum scale factor for the icon under the cursor (1.0 to 3.0).

key.name: icon-magnification-all
key.description: When enabled, the magnification effect also applies to the workspace minimap, show-apps button, and quick settings icon. When disabled, only app icons are magnified.

key.name: magnification-hover-highlight
key.description: Show the background highlight on icons when hovered during magnification. Disable to let the zoom effect stand alone without the tinted background.

key.name: show-volume-control
key.summary: Show per-app volume control in context menu
key.description: Show a volume slider in the dock icon context menu for apps with active audio streams.

key.name: command-palette-enabled
key.description: Show a fuzzy-search launcher overlay when pressing the configured hotkey.

key.name: command-palette-shortcut
key.description: Keyboard shortcut to toggle the dock command palette.

key.name: live-window-thumbnails
key.summary: Show live window thumbnails as dock icons
key.description: Replace static app icons with live miniature previews of running app windows. The thumbnail updates in real time and reverts to the static icon when the app is not running.

key.name: badge-overrides
key.description: JSON object mapping app IDs to badge configuration. Each entry: {"appId": {"enabled": true/false, "source": "auto"|"notifications"|"app-counter"|"none"}}.

key.name: dock-profiles
key.description: JSON array of named dock configuration profiles.

key.name: active-profile
key.description: Name of the currently active dock profile.

key.name: secondary-dock-enabled
key.description: Show a secondary dock on a different screen edge displaying only running (non-favorite) applications.

key.name: secondary-dock-position
key.description: Screen edge for the secondary dock. Must be different from the primary dock position.
